name: git-gud-vscode
description: Competitive Git coaching with esports-style roasts

gitgud.enabled.description: Enable or disable Git Gud event monitoring and roasts.

gitgud.notificationsEnabled.description: Show notification popups when git events are detected.

gitgud.soundEnabled.description: Play esports-style sound effects on git events (requires sidebar open).

enumDescriptions: Gentle nudges — still helpful, less flame
Balanced roasting — the default competitive experience
Maximum toxicity — for those who thrive on chaos
gitgud.roastIntensity.description: Controls the intensity of roast notifications.

gitgud.ollamaApiKey.description: API key for Ollama cloud AI roast generation. Leave empty to use template roasts.

gitgud.ollamaModel.description: Ollama model to use for AI roasts (default: kimi-k2.6:cloud).

gitgud.ollamaBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the Ollama API (default: https://ollama.com/v1).
